relatability_triggers: Lead type: Benefits grid + Social proof

headline.primary: How I raised myself from the bottom of my company... to the top... by discovering a simple secret
subheadline_variants: How to out-think the $250,000-a-year management consultants
I-Power lifts you from the ranks of the also-rans into the ranks of the winners
How to increase your influence with superiors and subordinates
The 'master key' to inspiring success in yourself and others

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: Instead of promising business tactics or management techniques, promises a SIMPLE SECRET that enabled vertical career mobility
schema_analysis.whitespace_territory: Career ascension through a single principle rather than skill accumulation

lead.full_text:
The copy opens with a dense grid of benefits formatted as bullet points:

• How to turn your good ideas into breakthrough accomplishments (Page 149)
• How to keep a step ahead of rapidly changing technology (Page 69)
• How to achieve positive results in every area of your life (Page 11)
• How to complete any job right the first time - on time (Page 77)
• The simple secret of winning more customers and keeping them for life (Page 79)
• How to generate fresh enthusiasm and raise the energy level of everyone around you (Page 195)
• How to manage, motivate and inspire others to higher levels of achievement (Page 53)
• Trigger profitable solutions to any company's problems (Page 63)
• Master the art of delegation - and look great to upper management (Page 39)
• How to bring out the best in people time after time (Page 30)
• How to turn your special talent into your professional edge (Page 109)
• How to transform positive thinking into positive action (Page 23)
• How to think and communicate more effectively (Page 57)
• Let your co-workers help make you a great success (Page 65)
• 10 ways to turn an interview into a great paying job (Page 88)
• 9 lessons for continuous improvement (Page 184)
• 8 ways to make your hiring decisions three times more profitable (Page 89)
• 2 biggest management mistakes - and how to avoid them (Page 20)

Then powerful testimonial: 'I-POWER is the best business book I've ever read... and I've read them all.' - Robert Half, Robert Half International
lead.curiosity_creation: Massive benefit list creates 'what's the organizing principle?' curiosity

big_idea.statement: I-Power: The ultimate leverage comes not from your own ideas, but from systematically harvesting the ideas of everyone around you - creating an exponentially expanding idea engine that makes you invaluable.
big_idea.supporting_idea: Every person in your organization has 200+ valuable ideas per year. Most companies capture zero. The person who learns to harvest ALL ideas becomes unstoppable.

mechanism.name: I-Power (Shared Idea Power)
mechanism.primary_mechanism: A systematic process for eliciting, collecting, rewarding, and implementing ideas from every person in your sphere of influence

mechanism_reveal_architecture.reveal_timing: Mechanism revealed through Martin Edelston's origin story of implementing the system
mechanism_reveal_architecture.proof_to_mechanism_ratio: Heavy proof with concrete examples ($10 for idea that saved hundreds of thousands on postage)

key_mechanism_components: Create culture where ideas = wealth for all

promise.primary_promise: Build a $100-million business and make your career much more personally and financially rewarding
promise.promise_specificity: Vertical career mobility from any starting position + exponential business growth

believability_factors: Specific idea-value examples ($10 payment saved hundreds of thousands)
200 ideas per person per year statistic
Testimonials from Robert Half and other authorities

strongest_proof_elements.text: Would you pay $10 for one idea? I did. To a clerk whose question saved my company hundreds of thousands of dollars on postage every year.
Would you pay $2 for one? I did. To a young lady who spotted a way to put $10,000 back in our pocket in one order with a new vendor.
'I-POWER is the best business book I've ever read... and I've read them all.' - Robert Half, Robert Half International
'I-POWER has done wonders for one of our clients... now we're doing it - and recommending it to other clients.' - Arnold Cohen of Mahoney Cohen & Co., CPAs
'I-POWER opens the door to creativity and allows us to do things much, much better today than we did yesterday.' - Dr. Dale G. Gatz, President, The Wartburg Home

proof_inventory.proof_density: Very high - multiple testimonials from diverse authorities plus specific dollar examples

offer.core_offer: I-Power 223-page book FREE + 3 free issues of Boardroom Reports magazine
offer.price: $48 for 21 additional issues (total 24) if kept after free trial, or return and owe nothing
offer.guarantee: No-risk free trial - keep 3 free issues and book even if canceled
offer_components: Option to continue with 21 more issues at $48
No obligation to continue after free trial
value_stack: I-Power book (unstated value but positioned as highly valuable)
Continuous flow of proven business ideas from magazine
urgency_elements: Scarcity implied by special invitation framing

story_elements.primary_story_type: Founder origin story + Idea-harvesting success stories
story_beats: Martin Edelston built $100M business using I-Power
Clerk saves company hundreds of thousands with one question (paid $10)
Young lady spots $10,000 savings with vendor (paid $2)
Supplier finds simplification savings without being asked (paid nothing but gets more business)
These people make small fortunes through profit-sharing - average 200 ideas per year each
System creates exponential wealth for everyone involved
story_elements.emotional_progression: Stuck/undervalued (people with untapped ideas) → Recognition (ideas have value) → Wealth creation (profit sharing) → Mutual success (everyone wins)

metadata.author: Martin Edelston
metadata.target_audience: Business professionals, managers, executives seeking career advancement

fssit_candidates.statement: Remember, now, I-POWER means shared idea power, where you and everyone else that shares with you cuts up a bigger, and then bigger, piece of the pie that ALL of your ideas create.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Explains why traditional management approaches felt extractive or zero-sum - this is about EXPANDING the pie together, not fighting over fixed resources

fssit_candidates.statement: Am I taking advantage of these people? Not at all! I'm building their futures, at the same time that I'm building my own.
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Addresses the guilt or ethical concern about 'using' people's ideas - reframes it as mutual wealth creation

fssit_candidates.statement: No wonder each of them gives me an average of 200 ideas a year! And you can have this same kind of idea-flow coming to you, within minutes after you pick up this book!
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Explains why innovation felt hard or scarce - you were trying to generate ideas alone instead of harvesting them systematically from everyone

rsf_analysis.fssit_placement_pattern: FSSITs appear in mid-body to address potential objections and reframe the idea-harvesting concept

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: Success comes not from YOUR ideas but from systematically harvesting OTHERS' ideas - complete inversion of the 'be a visionary leader' paradigm
schema_analysis.whitespace_territory: Idea aggregation and shared profit system rather than individual innovation or leadership vision

narrative_reorganization.domain_scope: Business management, career advancement, organizational innovation
narrative_reorganization.self_blame_removal: You haven't failed because you lack great ideas. You've been trying to do it alone when there are 200 ideas per person around you waiting to be harvested.
narrative_reorganization.coherence_creation: All those business books about leadership vision, innovation, and strategy that felt impossible to implement - they were asking you to be superhuman. This system makes EVERYONE the innovator.
narrative_reorganization.new_self_concept: Not an individual visionary who must generate breakthrough ideas alone, but an orchestrator who unlocks collective genius and creates shared wealth

temporal_analysis.cultural_moment_reference: No specific temporal reference - timeless business principles
temporal_analysis.temporal_urgency_device: Free trial creates urgency to act now

three_part_structure.what_they_think: Career success and business growth require YOU to be the visionary, the idea generator, the strategic genius
three_part_structure.what_it_really_is: Every person around you has 200+ valuable ideas per year that are going unharvested - the key is creating a systematic idea-capture and profit-sharing system
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: Previous leadership and innovation training asked you to be superhuman (generate all the ideas yourself) instead of teaching you to orchestrate collective genius

root_cause_architecture.villain: Traditional management consulting and lone-genius leadership paradigm

notable_patterns: Specific dollar amounts for idea rewards ($10, $2, $0) create concrete visualization
200 ideas per person per year statistic is repeated for memorability
Profit-sharing outcome demonstrated through 'small fortunes' description
Multiple authority testimonials from diverse fields validate cross-industry applicability
Free trial offer removes risk barrier completely
genius_elements: I-Power naming creates memorable brand identity
Inversion of leadership paradigm: Don't generate ideas, harvest them
Ethical objection preemptively addressed: 'Am I taking advantage?'
Concrete micro-examples ($10 clerk idea) make abstract concept tangible
Free book + free trial = pure upside, no downside
